description: Through-the-Clouds — Borneo SAR catalog. Replaces the vendor's French (IGN/BD TOPO) defaults. Local rasters are read by ttc_* recipes via add_layer with explicit /data/inputs paths (mounted read-only from ../real-data).

sources.name: CartoDB Dark Matter
sources.description: Dark basemap (matches the NEAT monochrome frontend aesthetic).

sources.name: Esri World Imagery
sources.description: Optical context (cloud-obscured over the AOI — the reason this project uses SAR).

sources.name: PALSAR-2 HV 2022 (gamma0 dB)
sources.description: ALOS-2 PALSAR-2 L-band HV annual mosaic, baseline year. Already calibrated to gamma0 dB (ADR-0003).

sources.name: PALSAR-2 HV 2023 (gamma0 dB)
sources.description: ALOS-2 PALSAR-2 L-band HV annual mosaic, comparison year.

sources.name: Hansen GFC loss-year
sources.description: Hansen Global Forest Change loss-year (0=none, n→2000+n). Optical/cloud-limited cross-reference, NOT ground truth (ADR-0005).
